text: Cloudy. Showers, heavy at times. Occasional thunderstorms. Force 3 to 5 south to southwesterly winds with gusts, becoming northerlies.
Mainly cloudy. One or two showers at first. Force 3 to 4 north to northeasterly winds, occasionally force 5 with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. One or two showers. Force 3 to 4 east to northeasterly winds, occasionally force 5.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. Force 3 to 4 southeasterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. A few thundery showers. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. Force 2 to 4 north to northeasterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. Force 2 to 4 easterly winds.
